related_stage_3_architecture_constraints: Async job states must be visible

keyboard_requirements: All navigation, forms, tables, modals, drawers, wizards, tabs, and menus are keyboard operable.
Import mapping grid supports keyboard row and field navigation.
Quote builder line items support keyboard add, edit, reorder where supported, and remove actions.
screen_reader_expectations: Async job updates use polite live regions for progress and assertive messaging for failure.
Validation summaries link to invalid fields.
Status badges include text labels, not color alone.
Tables have headers, row labels, and clear sort/filter announcements.
focus_management: Wizard step changes move focus to step heading.
Modals and drawers trap focus and return focus to trigger.
After save or error, focus moves to confirmation or validation summary.
Generated-output sharing confirmation focuses revocation and copy-link controls.
contrast_and_readability: Text and interactive controls meet AA contrast.
Margin alerts and error states use icon plus text plus color.
Dense tables preserve minimum touch and click target sizes.
form_accessibility: Every input has a visible label.
Required fields are announced and visually indicated.
Error messages are field-specific and summarized at form level.
motion_constraints: No required information is conveyed by animation.

accessibility_risks.risk: Import mapping and quote line editing can become inaccessible if built as pointer-only grids.
accessibility_risks.mitigation: Require keyboard and screen-reader-operable table/grid patterns before implementation acceptance.

accessibility_risks.risk: Status badges for margin and approval may rely on color alone.
accessibility_risks.mitigation: Use text labels, icons, and accessible descriptions.

accessibility_risks.risk: Async failures may be missed if only shown as transient toasts.
accessibility_risks.mitigation: Use persistent inline panels and status center records.

ux_decisions.decision: Accessibility is a baseline launch requirement, not a later enhancement.
ux_decisions.rationale: Operational workflows depend on forms, tables, validation, and async states.

stage_5_handoff_notes: Frontend implementation must include keyboard QA for import review, pricing tables, bundle components, and quote lines.
Visual QA must include contrast checks for status badges and alerts.
